Home / Service Areas / Mesa

Carpenter in Mesa, AZ

Trusted local professionals serving Mesa and surrounding communities

Serving Mesa, AZ

West Frames and Crates is dedicated to providing top-notch carpentry services in Mesa, Arizona. As the third-largest city in Arizona, Mesa offers a diverse community and a rich history. We recognize the prevalent architectural styles in Mesa, particularly the 1970s and 80s stucco homes that define many neighborhoods. Our team is skilled in updating and enhancing these homes with custom carpentry solutions. We understand the importance of durability and longevity in the Mesa climate, where extreme summer heat can take a toll on outdoor structures. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure your carpentry projects withstand the elements. From custom decks and pergolas to interior trim and cabinetry, West Frames and Crates is committed to delivering exceptional craftsmanship and personalized service to Mesa homeowners.

Mesa features a mix of residential areas, commercial centers, and recreational opportunities, reflecting its growth and diverse population.

Trim & Molding Installation
